quality_highlights: template_injection_validation.go: formatTemplateInjectionError is exemplary — groups violations by context, limits to 3 examples, provides safe+unsafe pattern side-by-side, and links to 3 references. Pre-compiled regex names are self-documenting.
compile command (main.go): precise short description, 8 examples organized by use-case, --dependabot flag gets full prose explanation of ecosystem coverage

single_file_improvements.issue: run-failure (line 42) uses 🏛️ identity emoji, same as run-started (line 40) — failure and start are visually indistinguishable in notification feeds. run-success has double exclamation marks and redundant 📋. Fix: use ⚠️ for run-failure, remove double exclamations, adopt em-dash style consistent with security-review.md.

Lines 95-96: Step 4 opens with 3 sentences of promotional marketing copy ('you are in control!', 'fully customizable', 'your priorities and your needs') before the actionable instructions. Replace with single direct transition sentence. Inconsistent with dry task-focused tone of Steps 1-3.
